title: Stage 07 — Per-persona creative brief
description: Typed I/O contract for /mkt-creative-run Stage 07 (design §2/§6.1 — no free-text handoffs). Stage 07 turns the approved persona + segment + force-map into a tight per-persona brief that the Stage-08 script consumes. non_negotiables is the brand-safety floor seed — the standing constraints (e.g. muted-first, never lead with an unverified guarantee, never ask for payment up front) that every downstream stage inherits. Each persona's single-minded proposition (smp) is exactly ONE sentence. Copy-bearing proof + cta carry claim_refs. provenance: run_id + generated_at.

claimRef.description: A reference to one approved/declared claim id in context/claims.json (e.g. "CLM-008"). The bare id only — render markers ([[...]]/{{...}}) are presentation. The deterministic claims floor reads these to fail-close on unverified claims.

claimRefs.description: Every claim id this copy-bearing object asserts (may be empty). Typed surface for the claims gate — never inferred from prose.

run_id.description: Timestamped run id (e.g. 20260608-072919) — ties this artifact to the run manifest.

generated_at.description: ISO timestamp this brief was produced.

non_negotiables.description: Brand-safety floor SEED — the standing non-negotiable constraints every downstream creative stage must honor (e.g. 'muted-first', 'never lead with an unverified guarantee', 'no price in a cold attention ad', 'never ask for payment up front'). Each entry is one constraint string.

personas.description: One brief entry per persona this run targets. Each is the single-minded direction the Stage-08 script must execute.

persona_ref.description: Persona this brief targets, referencing context/proposed/audience-personas.md (e.g. "Persona 4 — Thảo").

segment_ref.description: Segment the persona traces to, referencing context/proposed/audience-segments.md (e.g. "Segment A").

territory.description: The creative territory / angle this brief stakes out (the strategic lane the creative occupies).

smp.description: Single-minded proposition — exactly ONE sentence. The one idea the ad must land.

objective.description: The campaign objective this brief serves (e.g. cold-prospecting attention + free-band-check lead). Names the objective so Tier-B outcome claims stay honest.

tone.description: Brand voice / tone for this persona (per context brand-voice), e.g. 'urgent-but-reassuring mentor, no hype'.

format.description: Format spec the script must hit (e.g. '9:16 vertical, muted-first, ≤15s, hook on-screen text in first 2s').

proof_claim_refs.description: The claim id(s) backing this brief's proof point (e.g. ["CLM-008"]). Empty when the brief asserts no PrepEdu claim. Copy-bearing → typed for the claims gate.

cta.description: The call-to-action direction (e.g. 'Kiểm tra band miễn phí' → inline band-check → Zalo OA). Copy-bearing; any claim it carries is listed in proof_claim_refs.
